failure_movement.justification: Empty: predicted 10->2-4, actual 11->8 (right direction, magnitude overstated). Wrong: predicted flat/up, actual 10->6 (down, contradicted). Unknown synthesis: predicted shrink, actual grew 26->32 (wrong direction). Correct ~flat (53->54). Mixed: one good call, two off.

trace_movement.justification: Completion tokens predicted down: confirmed 205.4->166.8. Prompt predicted up; actually fell 1588->1524 (mild miss; dual-pass retained). Cap-512 hits dropped 13->8. Excerpts-section span claim unverifiable in raw JSON, judged plausible. Most token claims confirmed.

side_effects.justification: Completion-token drop correctly called and held. Prompt-token rise wrong (fell). Flagged narrative-flow regression risk plausibly aligns with unknown cluster growing 26->32. Partial credit: one confirmed, one false, one defensible.
